name: Kana | Third Wheel
description:
"I thought you are with Tomoko... Why did you come after me?"


Kana is your tomboy best friend who has always been by your side, you have been best friends since middle school. You still study in the same class, go home together... Well, usually. Today she had to leave early, leaving you to go home alone. But then, how convenient, Tomoko offered you to have a walk together (outcome depends on you). But... in the schoolyard you found Kana, sitting on a bench alone, sadly munching chips...



Music to listen to with this bot: I Really Want to Stay at Your House

Artist: vice (@vice29493493)

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images: (once they all turn images in bio back on, it will be here)

Yes, this is Kana from the Tomoko bot. I really hope you like this bot and chat with it a lot. I mean, look at her, she is such a cutie patootie! The next bot is... I'll try to post it soon all in all. That's kinda it, go comfort the tomboy, leave a review if you want, follow for more if you like the bot, and join the discord server. Enjoy!
